info.title: CloudLens API
info.description: Azure FinOps Managed Service — cost intelligence API

get.description: List all tenant configurations.

schema.title: Response List Tenants Api V1 Tenants  Get

post.description:
Create a new tenant configuration.
SP credentials are stored in Key Vault; only the secret reference is persisted.

delete.description: Soft-delete: sets active=False. Does not remove data.

get.description: Return aggregated cost summary for a tenant.
Return waste items for a tenant, optionally filtered by priority.

schema.title: Response List Waste Items Api V1 Waste  Tenant Id  Get

patch.description: Mark a waste item as resolved.

schema.title: Response List Reports Api V1 Reports  Tenant Id  Get

post.description: Enqueue a report generation job. Returns immediately with status=pending.

get.description: Return a fresh SAS download URL for a report.

schema.title: Response Get Download Url Api V1 Reports  Report Id  Download Get

get.description: Baseline spend forecast (Holt-Winters, weekly seasonality, with backtest MAPE).
Dual-trajectory forecast: do-nothing vs. if-you-act, with cost-of-inaction.
ROI-ordered, phased remediation roadmap with run-rate bending down per phase.
Predict the date cumulative spend breaches the budget, do-nothing vs. if-actioned.
Detect spend anomalies outside the seasonal forecast band, with attribution.
Allocate spend to cost-centers by tag, with shared-cost distribution.

The flagship endpoint: fuse waste, anomalies, chargeback, and forecast into a
ranked, business-language digest with an executive summary.
List all budgets for a tenant.

schema.title: Response List Budgets Api V1 Budgets  Tenant Id  Get

post.description: Create a budget (tenant-wide or scoped to a tag dimension+value).

get.description: Live budget status: spend-to-date, forecast month-end projection, and state.
Spend grouped by cloud provider, plus AI/LLM spend broken out.

schema.title: Response Multicloud Spend Api V1 Multicloud  Tenant Id  Spend Get

post.description: Run rule-based 100% allocation over FOCUS records.

schema.title: Response Allocate Api V1 Multicloud  Tenant Id  Allocate Post

get.description: Coverage, utilization, and commitment-purchase recommendations.

schema.title: Response Commitments Api V1 Multicloud  Tenant Id  Commitments Get

get.description: Return the full UI label set for a language (frontend i18n bootstrap).

schema.title: Response Labels Api V1 Multicloud Labels Get

get.description:
Aggregate FOCUS spend at `level`, filtered by any parent selections.
At the resource level, resource anomalies are flagged inline.

schema.title: Response Drilldown Api V1 Drilldown  Tenant Id  Get

get.description: Standalone list of resource-level anomalies across the (optionally filtered) estate.

schema.title: Response Resource Anomalies Api V1 Drilldown  Tenant Id  Resource Anomalies Get
Response List Rules Api V1 Alerts  Tenant Id  Rules Get

get.description: Most-recent alert events first.

schema.title: Response List Events Api V1 Alerts  Tenant Id  Events Get

get.description: CPU+memory rightsizing recommendations, including cross-family downgrades.

schema.title: Response Rightsizing Api V1 Optimization  Tenant Id  Rightsizing Get

get.description: On/off schedule recommendations for non-prod 24/7 resources.

schema.title: Response Scheduling Api V1 Optimization  Tenant Id  Scheduling Get

get.description: Estate-wide CPU/memory utilization with over-capacity scoring.

schema.title: Response Utilization Api V1 Optimization  Tenant Id  Utilization Get

post.description: Mark a saving as actioned; records the baseline cost for later measurement.

get.description: Roll up identified vs actioned vs realized savings — closes the ROI loop.
Query the audit trail (most recent first).

schema.title: Response Get Audit Api V1 Admin Audit Get

get.description: Verify the audit hash chain is intact — proof the trail is tamper-evident.

schema.title: Response Audit Integrity Api V1 Admin Compliance Audit Integrity  Tenant Id  Get

get.description: The SOC 2-aligned control matrix with per-control CLI evidence commands.

schema.title: Response Compliance Matrix Api V1 Admin Compliance Matrix Get

post.description:
Generate a compliance evidence pack: the control matrix with CLI proof
commands, plus the audit-chain integrity result. Records the export itself
in the audit log (CC7.2). The admin page renders/downloads this.

schema.title: Response Evidence Export Api V1 Admin Compliance Evidence Export Post

post.description:
Manually trigger a cost ingestion run for a tenant.
Runs inline as a background task — returns 202 immediately.

schema.title: Response Trigger Ingest Api V1 Ingest  Tenant Id  Post

get.description: Liveness + dependency health check.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Health  Get

CostSummary.description: Aggregated cost summary for a tenant/period

CostTrend.description: Daily cost trend for sparkline / chart

alert_email.title: Alert Email
alert_email.description: Recipient of weekly digest and alerts

sp_secret_ref.title: Sp Secret Ref
sp_secret_ref.description: Key Vault secret name for SP credentials

TenantConfig.title: TenantConfig
TenantConfig.description: Cosmos DB document — partition key: id

alert_email.title: Alert Email
alert_email.description: Recipient of weekly digest and alerts

sp_client_secret.title: Sp Client Secret
sp_client_secret.description: Service principal secret (stored to Key Vault)

TenantUpdate.title: TenantUpdate
TenantUpdate.description: Payload for PATCH /api/v1/tenants/{id} — all fields optional

monthly_cost_eur.title: Monthly Cost Eur
monthly_cost_eur.description: Current monthly cost of this resource

WasteItem.title: WasteItem
WasteItem.description: Detected waste item — Cosmos container: waste_items
